effects.name: T-Rex
effects.effect: Cannot be Charged. Super Evolves from T-Rex. Your Opponent gets KO 2 Points if defeated. You can only play 1 Super Evolve Vivosaur card in your Deck.

effects.name: Volcanic Abyss
effects.effect: This Vivosaur's Attack Skills require -1 FP for each FIRE Vivosaur in your Discard Pile.

effects.name: Lordly Strike
effects.effect: Discard 1 FIRE Vivosaur from your Deck.

effects.name: Lordly Fire
effects.effect: Charge up to 3 FIRE Vivosaurs from your Discard Pile, and it becomes your End Phase.
